Books.Title: The Pragmatic Programmer
Books.Author: David Thomas & Andrew Hunt
Books.Description: A classic guide to software craftsmanship covering topics from personal responsibility to architectural techniques.

Books.Title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
Books.Author: Martin Kleppmann
Books.Description: The big ideas behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems, with detailed analysis of the algorithms and protocols.

Books.Title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
Books.Author: Harold Abelson & Gerald Jay Sussman
Books.Description: The legendary MIT textbook introducing core concepts of computation through Scheme.

Books.Title: Clean Code
Books.Author: Robert C. Martin
Books.Description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship with practical advice for writing better code.

Books.Title: The Art of Computer Programming
Books.Author: Donald E. Knuth
Books.Description: Knuth's monumental multi-volume work covering fundamental algorithms and data structures.

Books.Title: Refactoring
Books.Author: Martin Fowler
Books.Description: Improving the design of existing code through systematic transformations with catalog of refactoring patterns.
